step_by_step_thinking: Unsaturated fatty acids, particularly those found in plant-based oils like olive oil or fish such as salmon, have been shown to improve cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation. These benefits contribute to lower risks of developing cardiovascular diseases.
raw_response:
Unsaturated fatty acids, particularly those found in plant-based oils like olive oil or fish such as salmon, have been shown to improve cholesterol levels and reduce inflammation. These benefits contribute to lower risks of developing cardiovascular diseases.

Therefore, my answer is B: Decreased risk of cardiovascular disease. Unsaturation seems beneficial for heart health based on current evidence.
